title: Telegram Bots: An introduction for developers
notes: Telegram documents that bots cannot start conversations with users; a user must add the bot to a group or send the bot a message first. This supports the issue requirement to detect DM delivery failures and tell users to send /start privately.

title: Telegram Bot API
notes: The Bot API documents the request/response shape, sendMessage behavior, getChatMember, and ChatMemberOwner status. It confirms sendMessage returns a Message on success and unsuccessful responses include an error description and code.

title: Telegram Bot API ChatMemberOwner
notes: Telegram identifies the chat owner status as creator, matching the repository's existing chat-owner permission check.

title: Telegram Bot API sendMessage
notes: sendMessage is the Bot API method used by this command to create the live terminal watch message in either the group chat or a direct message.
